visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a dark, sheer-sleeved top stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She is positioned in front of a shelf filled with plastic-packaged pastries. She leans in to look at a box of French desserts, her facial expression showing curiosity. The background features typical warehouse shelving, shoppers in the distance, and shopping carts. (2) The woman picks up a container of 'French Dessert Set' containing Canelés and Madeleines, holding it towards the camera. She points at the individual items with her finger, smiling and talking. Large text overlays and a Costco logo appear on the screen. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor home environment with warm, soft lighting. Two women sit at a gray table; one is the woman from the previous scene, and the other wears a black-and-white patterned bucket hat. They have plates with the desserts and a birdcage is visible in the background. (4) A close-up shot shows a hand using a metal knife to cut a golden-brown Madeleine and a dark Canelé on a wooden cutting board. The internal texture of the cakes is clearly visible, showing a soft, porous crumb. (5) Back to the two women at the table, they are shown tasting the desserts, making exaggerated facial expressions of enjoyment. They hold pieces of the cake up to the camera to show the details while continuing their discussion.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 小朋友你在看什麼. (2) [Subtitle]: 這是可麗露跟瑪德蓮. [Slogan]: 一顆33元. [Variety]: 討論度爆高! 法式點心組. (3) [Subtitle]: 而且他的可麗露聽說超厲害 裡面還有萊姆酒 還有隱藏吃法. (4) [Subtitle]: 他只有一半耶 這樣子很不錯 不用每次都那麽大份 而且這樣瑪德蓮也很好吃 就是可以都吃到 回去看看值不值得. (5) [Variety]: 好市多 法式點心組. [Subtitle]: 一個33塊. (6) [Subtitle]: 拿去烤箱氣炸鍋 烤過之後外酥內軟. (7) [Variety]: 新的香味. [Subtitle]: 而且它外面烤過那一層皮會焦糖化 就會有一個新的香味. (8) [Subtitle]: 不烤也非常好吃 就是非常的濕潤 然後有一點點朗姆酒香氣的蛋糕體. (9) [Slogan]: 非常推薦大家烤烤看. [Subtitle]: 但是烤過呢真的非常推薦大家烤烤看 因為會吃出很不一樣的味道. (10) [Slogan]: 一定要烤過再吃. [Subtitle]: 可麗露呢一定要烤過再吃 因為它常溫吃就是有一點莫名其妙 但是烤過之後呢 就會有可麗露那種外酥內軟. (11) [Variety]: 外酥內軟. [Subtitle]: 然後裡面的朗姆酒香氣也不會蒸發掉 非常的推薦哦. (12) [Subtitle]: 裡面QQ的好像麻糬 然後外面的脆皮是真的很厲害 咬一口就很酥 瑪德蓮好香哦 又濕潤.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 female passer-by in the Costco background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a dark sheer top; another young woman with a patterned bucket hat and a white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First half is inside a Costco warehouse with high ceilings, industrial shelves, and various consumer goods. Second half is a domestic indoor setting with a dining table, a birdcage, and home decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, female voice speaking in Traditional Chinese with an excited tone. A slightly deeper male voice asks a short question. The background music is an upbeat, rhythmic electronic track with a steady 4/4 beat. A light 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition. (2) As the setting changes, the primary female voice continues with a fast speech rate, describing the pastry set. The BGM remains consistent, maintaining a playful and bright atmosphere. Minor incidental rustling of plastic is audible as the package is handled. (3) A distinct, sharp percussive 'crunch' sound is heard, synchronized with a visual of a knife cutting into the cake. This sound effect has high high-frequency content, emphasizing crispness. The female voice resumes with a high pitch, expressing delight. (4) The audio concludes with overlapping female voices as two women share their tasting experience. The speech is dense and energetic. The BGM swells slightly towards the end before a final hard cut to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and promote a specific French pastry set available at Costco, specifically highlighting the price and the 'proper' way to enjoy them (reheating in an air fryer or oven) for the best texture and flavor experience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Reviewing a specific product from a named brand (Costco) and showing its packaging and price.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media food review editing: fast cuts, bright colors, and enthusiastic commentary to maintain viewer engagement.
